top_signals.title: Amazon investigating engineers who criticized AI data center expansion
top_signals.summary: Five Amazon employees testified at Seattle City Council meetings where officials sought feedback on a year-long data center new construction pause.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK gilt yields jump as borrowing rises and PM Starmer faces leadership challenge
top_signals.summary: Andy Burnham won the Makerfield by-election, defeating Reform UK by more than 9,000 votes with nearly 55% of the vote.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Prominent Cambodian political activist permanently silenced from politics
